title: arctanthemum integrifolium
intro: Arctanthemum integrifolium, also known as Arctic chamomile or Chamomilla arctica, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing anxiety and insomnia, soothing digestive issues, and calming skin irritations, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Arctanthemum integrifolium can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
